case_title: HALL,BETTY VS AFFORDABLE AUTO -ALEX DIRGE- GEN.MGR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,298.45 FILED BY HALL,BETTY AS TO DEFENDANT AFFORDABLE AUTO -ALEX DIRGE- GEN.MGR. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-12-1994 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL,BETTY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AFFORDABLE AUTO -ALEX DIRGE- GEN.MGR. $1,298.45 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,313.45 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT AFFORDABLE AUTO -ALEX DIRGE- GEN.MGR.
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23288, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HALL,BETTY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AFFORDABLE AUTO -ALEX DIRGE- GEN.MGR. PLTFF. WAS UNABLE TO PROVE CAUSE OF DAMAGE TO CAR. JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 23288 ON 8-17-94. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
